Off Calendar May-12-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTS HAROLD DARLING and Heather Cherry's Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp Sections 435, 436, 437 -- Granted; 10 days leave to answer. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
